description: self.table_name override chain — acceptable when wrapping multiple legacy tables in a namespace
input:
module Legacy
  class Invoice < ActiveRecord::Base
    self.table_name  = 'acctg_invoices'
    self.primary_key = 'invoice_number'

    # Legacy table uses VARCHAR primary key; cannot use AR default
    belongs_to :customer, class_name: 'Legacy::Customer',
                          foreign_key: 'cust_id'
  end
end
